title: Woodwork & Geology
body:
# Welcome to Woodwork & Geology! 
### A resource pack focused on naturally-generated blocks and whatnot!
_Requires [EMF & ETF](https://modrinth.com/collection/kIO71bBq)_

This is part of a series of small resource packs I want to make to enhance the Minecraft experience just that tad bit much that is appreciated but not overwhelming

**Planned & Finished stuff so far:**
- Farm Animals (2/4)
- All Logs (6/12)
- All grass-type blocks (3/4)
- All ores (3/16)
- All stone-type blocks (1/8)
- End Nature (a bit)
- Nether Nature (a lot)
- Sand-related stuff (2/also a bit)

![Some (old) block showcases](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FdZRF9gr/images/4c09e63d9ce5ab6dc83080dcf23d3718579ddf40.png)

This pack was made taking inspiration from a lot of other things, namely [Rappenem's Reforge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rappenems-reforge) and [Mossy's Better DIrt](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mossys-better-dirt)
